title: PDD Holdings (PDD) (the Temu guys): Chinese ecommerce & the price of a rural moat
show: Earnings Unscripted: Stock Earnings Calls & Analysis
description:
PDD Holdings just delivered 14% revenue growth in Q4, but intentionally cratered its own net income by 16% to bankroll remote logistics and factory R&D.

In ~10 minutes:
• Why operating cash flow was slashed by nearly 50% QoQ.
• Funding physical factory upgrades instead of buying cheap ad traffic.
• Absorbing rural transit fees to unlock a massive new demographic.
• Management's blunt admission that internal talent lagged behind growth.
• Navigating mutually exclusive compliance rules across 100

title: PDD Holdings Inc. (PDD) Announced Q4 2025 Earnings on March 25, 2026, Reporting "total revenues increased 12% year-over-year to RMB 123.9 billion".
description:
For the fourth quarter of 2025, PDD Holdings Inc. reported that total revenues increased 12% year-over-year to RMB 123.9 billion, and for the full year 2025, revenues were RMB 431.8 billion.
Fourth quarter revenues from online marketing services and others were RMB 60 billion, while transaction services revenues for the quarter reached RMB 63.9 billion.
The company reported a fourth quarter GAAP operating profit of RMB 27.7 billion and a non-GAAP operating profit of RMB 29.5 billion, representin

title: PDD (Business Value Intelligence)
description: This episode presents a comprehensive financial and strategic analysis of PDD Holdings, examining both its domestic platform Pinduoduo and international platform Temu, incorporating recent Q1 2025 earnings data. It details PDD's social commerce business model and diverse revenue streams, primarily from online marketing and transaction services. title: Market View: Xiaomi Surges, PDD Stumbles & AI Stock Picks for China
description:
Markets rally as Asia-Pacific indices mirror Wall Street’s gains.
 Xiaomi’s profits surge 65%—but why are its shares still down?
 PDD Holdings disappoints investors, sending its stock tumbling 13%.
 Morgan Stanley and HSBC name top AI stocks to watch in China.
 Salesforce makes a bold $8B move for Informatica—what's the strategy?
 Hosted by Michelle Martin with Ryan Huang. Companies mentioned: Xiaomi, PDD

description:

title: PDD Tumbles, Trump Media Falls, Apple Jumps
description: On this episode of Stock Movers:PDD: Shares of Temu owner PDD Holdings Inc. plunged in US trading after its quarterly sales and profit missed estimates, underscoring how trade tensions between Beijing and Washington are taking a toll on its business. Revenue for the March quarter was 95.7 billion yuan ($13.3 billion), falling short of the average analyst estimate of 101.6 billion yuan.
